title: potentilla × subternata
intro: Potentilla × subternata, also known as the hybrid cinquefoil, is a cross between Potentilla fruticosa and Potentilla trifida, resulting in a shrub-like perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Potentilla × subternata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system, as well as its ability to act as an antiviral agent. Herbal preparations of Potentilla × subternata can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
